name: Wartime Mobilization
descriptionTemplate: When commanding infantry units, there is a X% chance to deal a critical attack and recovers 15% of your maximum HP each turn. At the same time, the commander and all infantry units within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more damage and receive 25% less damage. (If the general has this skill, the effects of Infantry Leader are inapplicable.)

progression.renderedDesc: When commanding infantry units, there is a 20% chance to deal a critical attack and recovers 15% of your maximum HP each turn. At the same time, the commander and all infantry units within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more damage and receive 25% less damage. (If the general has this skill, the effects of Infantry Leader are inapplicable.)
progression.renderedDescFr: Lorsque vous commandez des unités d'infanterie, there is a 20% chance to deal a attaques critiques and recovers 15% of your maximum PV chaque tour. At the same time, the commander and all unités d'infanterie within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more dégâts and receive 25% less dégâts. (If the general has this skill, the effects of infanterie Leader are inapplicable.)

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Wartime Mobilization » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Lorsque vous commandez des unités d'infanterie, there is a 100% chance to deal a attaques critiques and recovers 15% of your maximum PV chaque tour. At the same time, the commander and all unités d'infanterie within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more dégâts and receive 25% less dégâts. (If the general has this skill, the effects of infanterie Leader are inapplicable.) ». Signature propre à un général : son niveau maximum conditionne la valorisation de la carte.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Wartime Mobilization" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "When commanding infantry units, there is a 100% chance to deal a critical attack and recovers 15% of your maximum HP each turn. At the same time, the commander and all infantry units within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more damage and receive 25% less damage. (If the general has this skill, the effects of Infantry Leader are inapplicable.)". A general-specific signature: its max level drives the card's overall value.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Wartime Mobilization“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „When commanding infantry units, there is a 100% chance to deal a critical attack and recovers 15% of your maximum HP each turn. At the same time, the commander and all infantry units within a 2-hex radius deal 30% more damage and receive 25% less damage. (If the general has this skill, the effects of Infantry Leader are inapplicable.)“. Eine generalspezifische Signatur: Ihr Maximallevel bestimmt den Gesamtwert der Karte.
